ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of The Holographic Writing
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden and Susan Squires for Petitioners. Lindsey Kernan appeared by telephone for Children's Cancer Association.

Ms. McFadden stated that the matter needed to be set for an evidentiary hearing. The Court asked if the Parties would be interested in Pro Bono Mediation. Ms. McFadden stated that she felt that mediation would not be helpful until the issue of whether the hand written instrument is an amendment to the Trust, a codicil to the will or precatory statement to the Nephew is determined. Ms. Kernan indicated that the evidentiary hearing would be two to three days. The issue of the holographic writing was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) for setting, (order for the same signed in open court). Status on final distribution was set for January 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of The Holographic Writing
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Continued To Aug-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kyong Kim for Children's Cancer Association. Maureen McFadden and Susan Squires for and with George Connor (Trustee).

Ms. McFadden stated that she received the objections on Satruday and reqeusted a continuance for the Residuary Beneficiaries to receive the objections. Ms. Kim requested an evidentiary hearing. The Parties are to discuss the length of trial and if any discovery is needed. The issue of the holographic writing was continued to August 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on setting of the evidentiary hearing and status on discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions Under Probate Code...
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for and with George Connor and for Joseph Jordan. Linda Rottman appeared by telephone on behalf of Lindsey Kerman for Children's Cancer Association. Christopher Lamerdin for The Attorney Generals Office.

Ms. McFadden stated that verifications for all of the filed documents were submitted to the Court and that page 12 (missing page) of the Trust does not contain dispotive provisions. Mr. Lamerdin and Ms. Rottman have no objection to the issue of validity of the Trust, to the preliminary distribution of the specific bequests and to transfer of the assets to the Trust. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions with respect to all of the above (subject to review of the order). The issue of the holographic writing was continued to July 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will dispense with notice of future petitions to all of the Beneficiaries recieving the specific bequests once they have been paid.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Instructions Under Probate Code...
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Jun-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
